groupUrl.title: Group URL
groupUrl.description: Public Facebook group URL to scrape.

maxPosts.title: Max posts
maxPosts.description: Upper bound for accepted unique posts in one run.

runAnalyzerAtEnd.title: Run XLSX analyzer after scrape
runAnalyzerAtEnd.description: Runs the Gemini XLSX enrichment step after a single scrape run. Requires GEMINI_API_KEY in Actor environment variables.

scheduleTotalMinutes.title: Internal schedule total minutes
scheduleTotalMinutes.description: Optional. Keeps the Actor alive for repeated scrape cycles inside one run. On Apify, prefer platform schedules unless you need in-run accumulation.

scheduleIntervalMinutes.title: Internal schedule interval
scheduleIntervalMinutes.description: Minutes between internal scrape cycles when scheduleTotalMinutes is set.

scheduleRunAnalyzer.title: Run analyzer at schedule end
scheduleRunAnalyzer.description: Runs the XLSX analyzer after the final internal schedule cycle.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Use Apify Proxy or provide your own proxy URLs.

proxyCountryCode.title: Apify proxy country
proxyCountryCode.description: Optional two-letter country code for Apify Proxy exit IPs. Leave it empty to use any available country. If the selected country has no usable proxies, the Actor falls back to the same proxy setup without a fixed country.

sessionStateEnabled.title: Persist anonymous session state
sessionStateEnabled.description: Reuses anonymous browser storage state across session restarts within one Actor run.

sessionStateTtlHours.title: Session state TTL hours
sessionStateTtlHours.description: How long anonymous session state can be reused before it expires.

startupRetries.title: Startup retries
startupRetries.description: How many startup retries are allowed before the run fails.

startupSettleMs.title: Startup settle ms
startupSettleMs.description: Delay after initial navigation before startup block checks and extraction.

homeWarmup.title: Warm Facebook home first
homeWarmup.description: Open facebook.com first to bootstrap anonymous cookies before visiting the group.

homeWarmupDelayMs.title: Warmup delay ms
homeWarmupDelayMs.description: Additional delay after the Facebook home warmup step.

minDelayMs.title: Min delay ms
minDelayMs.description: Minimum randomized delay between feed advance attempts.

maxDelayMs.title: Max delay ms
maxDelayMs.description: Maximum randomized delay between feed advance attempts.

noNewPostCycles.title: No-new-post cycles
noNewPostCycles.description: Stop after this many consecutive cycles without new accepted posts or feed progress.

networkStallRecycleCycles.title: Network stall recycle cycles
networkStallRecycleCycles.description: Recycle the browser session after this many consecutive cycles without fresh network progress.

maxNetworkStallRestarts.title: Max network stall restarts
maxNetworkStallRestarts.description: Maximum number of browser restarts allowed to recover from network stalls in one run.

browserRecycleRequests.title: Browser recycle requests
browserRecycleRequests.description: Recycle the browser after this many requests to keep long runs stable.

browserLocale.title: Browser locale
browserLocale.description: Locale reported by the browser context.

browserTimezone.title: Browser timezone
browserTimezone.description: Optional timezone ID, for example Africa/Tunis.

userAgent.title: User agent
userAgent.description: User agent string used by Playwright.
userAgent.default: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/134.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

maxPostsToAnalyze.title: Max posts to analyze
maxPostsToAnalyze.description: Optional cap for the XLSX analyzer.

analyzerUseUnfilteredPosts.title: Analyze unfiltered posts
analyzerUseUnfilteredPosts.description: Use posts.unfiltered.json as the analyzer source instead of the filtered posts set.
